{{Infobox group
| name = Am’haranai
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Am’haranai Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Am’haranai, also known as the [[Consultants]], are an ancient order of hidden counselors whose origins predate the [[Imperial]] era. Defined by a philosophy of anonymity and the denial of individual identity, they dedicate themselves to lives of service performed from the shadows. Their name translates to 'hidden counselors' in a language older than [[Imperial]], and they are characterized by a tradition of being humble in appearance while remaining complex internally. The organization is led by the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]], which is governed by three [[High Council]] members who serve as the voice of the order. The Am’haranai function as a group of highly skilled agents and assassins for hire, maintaining influence and intelligence networks throughout the [[Aurelian Empire]]. While some view them as allies to the [[Regents]] in their pursuit of independence, they are also known for their legendary status as killers. The order is composed of various subgroups, such as the [[Architects]], who reside on the [[Gray Island]]. Members may include former slaves who have demonstrated significant aptitude. To facilitate their work, they utilize specialized mounts like [[Waveriders]] for rapid and quiet travel across water. Their history is marked by deep traditions, including specific burial rites involving weapons and black garments, and a commitment to protecting their clients and the order's goals through unwavering allegiance.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Am’haranai is an ancient order of killers for hire that has existed since before the first individual took the title of [[Gardener]]. This group, also known as the [[Consultants]], utilizes a language that predates [[Imperial]] and maintains eyes and ears throughout the [[Aurelian Empire]]. Historically, the Am’haranai used [[Waveriders]] as mounts and were buried with their weapons and blacks during the founding of their [[Guild]]. Their long history includes a shroud symbol dating back over two thousand years and secret laws that prevent non-human entities from holding seats on the [[Council of Architects]]. While the original members held secrets that [[Councilors]] attempted to bury, [[Shera]] eventually swore an oath of secrecy to protect the order.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The shroud is a symbol of the [[Am’haranai]] dating back over two thousand years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] are a group that used [[Waveriders]] as mounts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] is a language that predates [[Imperial]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] are the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] have eyes and ears throughout the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is called upon to swear secrecy in the name of the Am'haranai.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] is an order or group [[Shera]] swears to protect.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] have existed since before the first one called herself a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The original Am'haranai had secrets that [[Councilors]] tried to keep buried.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] were buried with their blacks and weapons at the founding of their [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] are an order of killers for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Am’haranai]] have secret laws that prohibit non-human entities from having a seat on the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Am'haranai are allies of the [[Regents]] for independence.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Architects]] are one of the orders of Am'haranai.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Am’haranai are an ancient order that predates the existence of the [[Empire]]. This group is characterized by their tendency to hide in the shadows like liars and criminals, often utilizing squads to infiltrate groups of servants. Members of this order are bound by a requirement to swear absolute obedience to their leader. Within the current political landscape, [[Bastion]] is specifically designed to defend this group during the execution of their duties.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Am’haranai]] are a group mentioned by [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A squad of [[Am’haranai]] could infiltrate servants.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Am'haranai order requires members to swear absolute obedience to their leader.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Am’haranai]] existed before the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Am’haranai]] hide in the shadows like criminals and liars.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Am’haranai]] are a group that [[Bastion]] is designed to defend during the execution of their duties.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Gardener Shera, in the name of the Am’haranai, I call upon you to swear your secrecy on the mists and on your name as a member of this Guild!”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
